verses.latin_vulgate: Alleluja.   Confitemini Domino, quoniam bonus,  quoniam in æternum misericordia ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הוֹד֣וּ לַיהֹוָ֣ה כִּי־ט֑וֹב כִּ֖י לְעוֹלָ֣ם חַסְדּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: O give thanks unto the Lord; for he is good: for his mercy endureth for ever.

verses.latin_vulgate: Confitemini Deo deorum,  quoniam in æternum misericordia ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ה֭וֹדוּ לֵאלֹהֵ֣י הָאֱלֹהִ֑ים כִּ֖י לְעוֹלָ֣ם חַסְדּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: O give thanks unto the God of gods: for his mercy endureth for ever.

verses.latin_vulgate: Confitemini Domino dominorum,  quoniam in æternum misericordia ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ה֭וֹדוּ לַאֲדֹנֵ֣י הָאֲדֹנִ֑ים כִּ֖י לְעוֹלָ֣ם חַסְדּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: O give thanks to the Lord of lords: for his mercy endureth for ever.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui facit mirabilia magna solus,  quoniam in æternum misericordia ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְעֹ֘שֵׂ֤ה נִפְלָא֣וֹת גְּדֹל֣וֹת לְבַדּ֑וֹ כִּ֖י לְעוֹלָ֣ם חַסְדּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: To him who alone doeth great wonders: for his mercy endureth for ever.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui fecit cælos in intellectu,  quoniam in æternum misericordia ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְעֹשֵׂ֣ה הַ֭שָּׁמַיִם בִּתְבוּנָ֑ה כִּ֖י לְעוֹלָ֣ם חַסְדּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: To him that by wisdom made the heavens: for his mercy endureth for ever.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui firmavit terram super aquas,  quoniam in æternum misericordia ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְרֹקַ֣ע הָ֭אָרֶץ עַל־הַמָּ֑יִם כִּ֖י לְעוֹלָ֣ם חַסְדּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: To him that stretched out the earth above the waters: for his mercy endureth for ever.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui fecit luminaria magna,  quoniam in æternum misericordia ejus :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְ֭עֹשֵׂה אוֹרִ֣ים גְּדֹלִ֑ים כִּ֖י לְעוֹלָ֣ם חַסְדּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: To him that made great lights: for his mercy endureth for ever:

verses.latin_vulgate: solem in potestatem diei,  quoniam in æternum misericordia ejus ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֶת־הַ֭שֶּׁמֶשׁ לְמֶמְשֶׁ֣לֶת בַּיּ֑וֹם כִּ֖י לְעוֹלָ֣ם חַסְדּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: The sun to rule by day: for his mercy endureth for ever:

verses.latin_vulgate: lunam et stellas in potestatem noctis,  quoniam in æternum misericordia ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֶת־הַיָּרֵ֣חַ וְ֭כוֹכָבִים לְמֶמְשְׁל֣וֹת בַּלָּ֑יְלָה כִּ֖י לְעוֹלָ֣ם חַסְדּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: The moon and stars to rule by night: for his mercy endureth for ever.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui percussit Ægyptum cum primogenitis eorum,  quoniam in æternum misericordia ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְמַכֵּ֣ה מִ֭צְרַיִם בִּבְכוֹרֵיהֶ֑ם כִּ֖י לְעוֹלָ֣ם חַסְדּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: To him that smote Egypt in their firstborn: for his mercy endureth for ever:

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui eduxit Israël de medio eorum,  quoniam in æternum misericordia ejus,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיּוֹצֵ֣א יִ֭שְׂרָאֵל מִתּוֹכָ֑ם כִּ֖י לְעוֹלָ֣ם חַסְדּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: And brought out Israel from among them: for his mercy endureth for ever:

verses.latin_vulgate: in manu potenti et brachio excelso,  quoniam in æternum misericordia ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּיָ֣ד חֲ֭זָקָה וּבִזְר֣וֹעַ נְטוּיָ֑ה כִּ֖י לְעוֹלָ֣ם חַסְדּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: With a strong hand, and with a stretched out arm: for his mercy endureth for ever.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui divisit mare Rubrum in divisiones,  quoniam in æternum misericordia ejus ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְגֹזֵ֣ר יַם־ס֭וּף לִגְזָרִ֑ים כִּ֖י לְעוֹלָ֣ם חַסְדּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: To him which divided the Red sea into parts: for his mercy endureth for ever:

verses.latin_vulgate: et eduxit Israël per medium ejus,  quoniam in æternum misericordia ejus ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהֶעֱבִ֣יר יִשְׂרָאֵ֣ל בְּתוֹכ֑וֹ כִּ֖י לְעוֹלָ֣ם חַסְדּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: And made Israel to pass through the midst of it: for his mercy endureth for ever:

verses.latin_vulgate: et excussit Pharaonem et virtutem ejus in mari Rubro,  quoniam in æternum misericordia ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְנִ֘עֵ֤ר פַּרְעֹ֣ה וְחֵיל֣וֹ בְיַם־ס֑וּף כִּ֖י לְעוֹלָ֣ם חַסְדּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: But overthrew Pharaoh and his host in the Red sea: for his mercy endureth for ever.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui traduxit populum suum per desertum,  quoniam in æternum misericordia ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְמוֹלִ֣יךְ עַ֭מּוֹ בַּמִּדְבָּ֑ר כִּ֖י לְעוֹלָ֣ם חַסְדּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: To him which led his people through the wilderness: for his mercy endureth for ever.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui percussit reges magnos,  quoniam in æternum misericordia ejus ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְ֭מַכֵּה מְלָכִ֣ים גְּדֹלִ֑ים כִּ֖י לְעוֹלָ֣ם חַסְדּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: To him which smote great kings: for his mercy endureth for ever:

verses.latin_vulgate: et occidit reges fortes,  quoniam in æternum misericordia ejus :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽ֭יַּהֲרֹג מְלָכִ֣ים אַדִּירִ֑ים כִּ֖י לְעוֹלָ֣ם חַסְדּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: And slew famous kings: for his mercy endureth for ever:

verses.latin_vulgate: Sehon, regem Amorrhæorum,  quoniam in æternum misericordia ejus ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְ֭סִיחוֹן מֶ֣לֶךְ הָאֱמֹרִ֑י כִּ֖י לְעוֹלָ֣ם חַסְדּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Sihon king of the Amorites: for his mercy endureth for ever:

verses.latin_vulgate: et Og, regem Basan,  quoniam in æternum misericordia ejus :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּ֭לְעוֹג מֶ֣לֶךְ הַבָּשָׁ֑ן כִּ֖י לְעוֹלָ֣ם חַסְדּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: And Og the king of Bashan: for his mercy endureth for ever:

verses.latin_vulgate: et dedit terram eorum hæreditatem,  quoniam in æternum misericordia ejus ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְנָתַ֣ן אַרְצָ֣ם לְנַחֲלָ֑ה כִּ֖י לְעוֹלָ֣ם חַסְדּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: And gave their land for an heritage: for his mercy endureth for ever:

verses.latin_vulgate: hæreditatem Israël, servo suo,  quoniam in æternum misericordia ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נַ֭חֲלָה לְיִשְׂרָאֵ֣ל עַבְדּ֑וֹ כִּ֖י לְעוֹלָ֣ם חַסְדּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Even an heritage unto Israel his servant: for his mercy endureth for ever.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia in humilitate nostra memor fuit nostri,  quoniam in æternum misericordia ejus ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שֶׁ֭בְּשִׁפְלֵנוּ זָ֣כַר לָ֑נוּ כִּ֖י לְעוֹלָ֣ם חַסְדּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Who remembered us in our low estate: for his mercy endureth for ever:

verses.latin_vulgate: et redemit nos ab inimicis nostris,  quoniam in æternum misericordia ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּפְרְקֵ֥נוּ מִצָּרֵ֑ינוּ כִּ֖י לְעוֹלָ֣ם חַסְדּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: And hath redeemed us from our enemies: for his mercy endureth for ever.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui dat escam omni carni,  quoniam in æternum misericordia ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נֹתֵ֣ן לֶ֭חֶם לְכׇל־בָּשָׂ֑ר כִּ֖י לְעוֹלָ֣ם חַסְדּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Who giveth food to all flesh: for his mercy endureth for ever.

verses.latin_vulgate: Confitemini Deo cæli,  quoniam in æternum misericordia ejus.  Confitemini Domino dominorum,  quoniam in æternum misericordia ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ה֭וֹדוּ לְאֵ֣ל הַשָּׁמָ֑יִם כִּ֖י לְעוֹלָ֣ם חַסְדּֽוֹ׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: O give thanks unto the God of heaven: for his mercy endureth for ever.
